title:
Lieta Nr.C30558021, Arhīva Nr.CA-0471-23/30. The decision of 9 June 2023 by the Riga Regional Court. ,

Latvia
text:
The defendant [for person A] registered a
figurative mark No M 76 342 (application of 10 November 2020), containing the
word sign ‘Coffee friend’ and a drawing of the top of the mug with a smiley
face in it for the services in Class 35 ‘trade in coffee beans’ and the
services in Class 43 ‘rental of coffee machines’ of the Nice Classification.
The applicant asked for this registration to be invalidated on the basis of
earlier rights as relative grounds, i.e. the commercial sign ‘Kafijas draugs’
(‘Coffee friend’) of companies and services used in the same sector of economic
activity, whose use in the economic circulation in Latvia had been commenced
legally and in good faith prior to the date of the application for registration
of the trade mark in 2014 (Article 10(1)(3) of the Trade Mark Law (TML),
non-registered trade marks or a domain name used in good faith in economic
circulation in Latvia in connection with identical or similar goods or services
prior to the date of the application for registration of the applicant‘s trade
mark for the duration and to the extent that the use of the registered trade
mark may confuse consumers about the origin of the respective goods or services
(Article 6(3) of the TML).
